message:
chore(lint): remove unused imports and fix lint warnings

- Remove unused imports in context-health, cost-forecast, cost-tracker, metrics
- Prefix unused variables/params with underscore (_log, _state, etc.)
- Remove useless switch case before default

Reduces lint warnings from 110 to 96.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
